title: The Merchandise Game
wikitext:
[]: The Merchandise Game.             Quote Post by skikes » Thu Apr 15, 2010 10:27 pm Post pictures of the most random Evangelion merchandise you can find... and a short description if you please. Mmmmm appetizing! (forgive me if there is already a similar topic but board tracker seems to be down at the moment.)

[]:             Quote Post by toe mash » Fri Apr 16, 2010 4:40 am There are loads of weird NGE merchandise pics you can find on this site, including Rei guitars and an eva humidifier and whatnot. But I don't think I got this pic from here

[]: Re: The Merchandise Game.             Quote Post by The Eva Monkey » Fri Apr 16, 2010 7:35 am skikes wrote: Post pictures of the most random Evangelion merchandise you can find... and a short description if you please. Mmmmm appetizing! (forgive me if there is already a similar topic but board tracker seems to be down at the moment.)

[]: Re: The Merchandise Game.             Quote Post by skikes » Fri Apr 16, 2010 7:48 am The Eva Monkey wrote: That's not merchandise. That's part of the Eva at Work series. Bad start.

[]:             Quote Post by Gib » Fri Apr 16, 2010 7:54 am Where can I buy that Adam sample?? It's amazing. [/quote]

[]: Re: The Merchandise Game.             Quote Post by The Eva Monkey » Fri Apr 16, 2010 8:20 am skikes wrote: Whatever monkey... you used to be cool.

[]:             Quote Post by Sachi » Fri Apr 16, 2010 8:30 am inb4 Asuka on the toilet.

[]:             Quote Post by drinian » Fri Apr 16, 2010 9:52 am And the Asuka toaster.

[]: Re: The Merchandise Game.             Quote Post by skikes » Fri Apr 16, 2010 12:44 pm The Eva Monkey wrote: I hate to break it to you, but I've never been cool. I'll have to pull my copy of E-Mono down off of the shelf and show you guys the breadth of merchandise that was out during Eva's heyday.
